title: Six in Paris
director: Claude Chabrol, Jean Douchet, Jean-Luc Godard
writer: Claude Chabrol, Jean Douchet, Jean-Luc Godard
actors: Jean-Pierre Andréani, Stéphane Audran, Nadine Ballot
plot: Six vignettes set in different sections of Paris, by six directors. St. Germain des Pres (Douchet), Gare du Nord (Rouch), Rue St. Denis (Pollet), and Montparnasse et Levallois (Godard) are stories of love, flirtation and prostitut...
